title: Add comprehensive SSA/ASS subtitle styling support using libass reference
author: community-contributor
description: Brings Media3's SSA subtitle formatting up to par with VLC by implementing full styling map.

title: Fix inaccurate duration and seeking in Variable Bitrate (VBR) MP3 files
author: androidx-maintainer
description: Resolves issue where seeking was off by ~25 seconds in VBR MP3s due to incorrect frame header parsing.

title: Fix manifest merging issue with IMA SDK taskAffinity
author: androidx-maintainer
description: Removes android:taskAffinity="" attribute introduced by IMA SDK v3.33.0 update that caused duplicate app instances.

title: Migrate core camera stack to CameraPipe architecture
author: google-pixel-team
description: Replaces legacy camera2 implementation with CameraPipe to align third-party apps with Pixel computational photography features.

title: Integrate Media3 Muxer into VideoCapture API
author: androidx-maintainer
description: Improves video encoding and stability by default using the Media3 Muxer for VideoCapture.
